title: Machi Open The Bottle Lyrics Mankatha Song Lyrics

stanzas:
Singer: Mano, Premgi Amaran,
Tippu, Haricharan, Naveen
Song: Machi Open The Bottle
Lyrics: Vaali
Music Director: Yuvan Shankar Raja

Machi Open The Bottle

Idhu Ambaani parambarai, anjaru thalamura
Aandham valarpira thaan
Naama kottu-nu oru mura
sonnaka palamura, kottaadho panamazhai thaan

Naama munnerum padikettu
Nam vazhvil cricket-u
Ippo onbadhu girahamum onnaga irukku
Oh ho-nu nam jaathagam

Aadama jaichomada, nam maeni vaadama jaichomada
Oadama run eduthom, summave otkaanthu win eduthom

Idhu Ambaani parambarai, anjaru thalamura
Aandham valarpira thaan
Naama kottu-nu oru mura
sonnaka palamura, kottaadho panamazhai thaan

Hey ..onna renda aasa unna kanda
Jillunu nikkira jigirdhanda.
Thappu Thanda seiya oppukonda
Poo mela kondhuven soala vanda

7zhu malai irukum kadavulukkum
Kaasu thaevaina panam kodupom,
Andha kuberan, aavaan kuselan
Namma proeperty munnaala single tea endraagm
andha sorgathin sothukkal thaan

Hey..ullaara verkaadu,
unnaala undaachu nokkaadu
Podendi sappaadu,
thottaaka podaadha koopaadu

Raman aandaalu, raavana aandaalu
ennakoru kavalai illa
hey naanthaan da, en mansaku raaja
vaangungada ye thangathil kooja
naana ketta keetatha kodupen
ketkura varangala ketukada

Ye thozha meena vazha neer venum
Naan vazha beer venum ne konjam oothu oothu
Thozha ippodhum eppodhum muppodhum
Veesidum nam pakkam kaathu kaathu
aathu kaalathil thoothikuven
Kaala nerathi maathikuven
Botha aanaalum, meeri ponaalum
Paatha oru naalum en kaalgal maarathu

Empaattu verathaan, ennaalum enrootu verathaan
Ennoda velathaan, ennaanu oorpesum naalaithaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates friendship and the joy of living life to the fullest, encouraging listeners to enjoy every moment.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

In Mankatha, this song reflects the carefree and fun-loving spirit of the characters, highlighting their bond and the excitement of their adventures.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features a collaboration of talented singers including Haricharan, Mano, Naveen Madhav, Premgi Amaren, and Tipu.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Machi Open The Bottle was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his innovative and catchy tunes.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 12, 2011, as part of the Mankatha soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Machi Open The Bottle, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song encapsulates the spirit of friendship and the thrill of living in the moment, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The energetic performances by the singers add to the overall vibe, making it a memorable track in the Mankatha soundtrack. With its upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics, this song evokes feelings of happiness and camaraderie among listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Machi Open The Bottle from Mankatha is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and camaraderie. With a unique collaboration of voices from Haricharan, Mano, and Tipu, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Yuvan Shankar Raja's electrifying music combined with Vaali's clever lyrics makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist.
stanzaMeanings: This is the Ambani lineage, a unique rhythm. It is the one that nurtures beauty. When we say we are going to celebrate, it is like a gentle rain.
We are moving forward, playing cricket in our lives. Now, the stars are aligned for us, oh ho, our destiny is in our favor.
We have won, our style has won. We took the run, and casually we won.
This is the Ambani lineage, a unique rhythm. It is the one that nurtures beauty. When we say we are going to celebrate, it is like a gentle rain.
Hey, I have two desires, seeing you is one. I will come with flowers, don’t refuse me.
Even the gods have mountains, we will give money if needed. That Kuberan, he is a rich man. Our property will be single tea, those are the treasures of heaven.
Hey, don’t look down on others, you have come into existence. Don’t throw away food, don’t shout unnecessarily.
Rama was a king, Ravana was a king, I have no worries. I am the king of my mind, don’t take my gold lightly, I will give you what you ask for.

Hey friend, I need water to live. I need beer to live, just blow a little. Friend, now and always, we will be together. Even if time changes, I will always be here. Even if I am a little lost, I will never change my feet.
I am different, but still, I am me. My work is mine, and my place is mine.
This is the Ambani lineage, a unique rhythm. It is the one that nurtures beauty. When we say we are going to celebrate, it is like a gentle rain.
We are moving forward, playing cricket in our lives. Now, the stars are aligned for us, oh ho, our destiny is in our favor.
We have won, our style has won. We took the run, and casually we won.
Mankatha Song Lyrics, my friend, open the bottle. This is our fun, let’s play Mankatha, come on, let’s go.
